title: roots.register
description: Register a single directory as a RegisteredSource of the given kind. Idempotent failure on duplicate (kind, path). Performs path existence, directory, and readability validation before inserting. Tauri command: roots.register. On success returns the registered source; on failure returns an error string via Tauri's Result<T, String> pattern.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to a readable directory on the local machine.

category.description: Which source category this directory belongs to.

scanSettings.description: Scan configuration object. Currently only scanDepth is extracted.

errors.description: Error codes returned as Err(String) via Tauri's Result pattern. The error message contains the human-readable description.

path.not_exists.description: Path does not exist on the filesystem.

path.not_directory.description: Path exists but is not a directory.

path.permission_denied.description: Directory exists but is not readable.

path.already_registered.description: Path is already registered under the same kind (idempotent).

path.already_registered.different_kind.description: Path is already registered under a different kind.
